code:
%%{CloudNative_DockerImage}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant User as 👤 User
    participant Browser as 🌐 Browser Panel
    participant Webview as 📱 Webview
    participant Proxy as 🔍 Proxy Monitor
    participant Protocol as 📜 Protocol Handler
    participant Packet as 📦 Packet Analysis
    participant GameState as 🎮 Game State
    participant UI as 🖼️ Traffic UI
    participant Session as 📹 Session Recorder
    participant MCP as 🤖 MCP (CloudNative_ServiceMesh)
    
    Note over User,MCP: Traffic Capture Flow
    
    User->>Browser: Interact with game
    Browser->>Webview: User action
    Webview->>Proxy: HTTP/AMF Request
    
    rect rgb(CloudNative_K8sCluster)
        Note over Proxy,Protocol: Request Interception
        Proxy->>Proxy: Capture headers & body
        Proxy->>Protocol: Raw packet data
        Protocol->>Protocol: Detect AMF3 format
        Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(CloudNative_K8sCluster)
        MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded structure
        Protocol->>Packet: Decoded packet
    end
    
    rect rgb(CloudNative_K8sCluster)
        Note over Packet,GameState: State Extraction
        Packet->>Packet: Identify action type
        Packet->>GameState: Update game state
        GameState->>GameState: Track cities, heroes, troops
    end
    
    rect rgb(CloudNative_HelmChart)
        Note over UI,Session: UI & Recording
        Packet->>UI: Traffic entry
        UI->>UI: Add to traffic list
        UI->>UI: Update counters
        
        alt Recording Active
            Packet->>Session: Record packet
            Session->>Session: Add to session buffer
        end
    end
    
    Proxy-->>Webview: Forward request
    Webview-->>Browser: Response
    
    Note over User,MCP: Response Capture Flow
    
    Browser->>Proxy: Server response
    Proxy->>Protocol: Response packet
    Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(CloudNative_ServiceMesh)
    MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded response
    Protocol->>Packet: Decoded response
    Packet->>GameState: Update state
    Packet->>UI: Response entry
    
    Note over User,MCP: Analysis Features
    
    User->>UI: Click traffic entry
    UI->>Packet: Get packet details
    Packet->>UI: JSON + Hex + Headers
    UI->>UI: Display in tabs
    
    User->>UI: Request analysis
    UI->>MCP: analyze_traffic(CloudNative_DockerImage)
    MCP-->>UI: Patterns & statistics
    UI->>UI: Display analysis

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的流量捕获流程图，从用户点击浏览器开始，一直到MCP分析结束。核心是要体现CloudNative架构里的几个关键组件：DockerImage、K8sCluster和HelmChart这三个环境。
明白了，用户通过Browser Panel操作，然后到Webview，再进入Proxy Monitor。我注意到MCP标注了CloudNative_ServiceMesh，这是作为解码服务吗？
对，MCP就是我们的ServiceMesh层，负责decode_packet。请求先到Proxy，Proxy capture headers和body之后，把raw packet data给Protocol Handler。
那我把请求拦截这一段用K8sCluster的色块框起来，里面包含Proxy自循环capture，以及Protocol detect AMF3 format，然后调用MCP解码。解码后的结构返回给Protocol，再传给Packet Analysis。
可以，但注意MCP返回的是Decoded structure，不是直接给Packet。中间经过Protocol转手。另外需要第二个K8sCluster色块处理State Extraction。
好的，第二个K8sCluster色块里：Packet先identify action type，然后update game state，GameState内部track cities, heroes, troops。
接下来是UI展示和录制部分，这个要用HelmChart色块。Packet把traffic entry给Traffic UI，UI要add to traffic list和update counters。
录制功能是条件触发的对吧？我画一个alt分支：Recording Active时，Packet给Session Recorder，Session内部add to session buffer。
没错。然后Proxy要把请求forward回Webview，再返回Browser。这里要单独标注Response Capture Flow。
响应流程：Browser到Proxy是server response，然后Proxy-Protocol是response packet，Protocol再调MCP的decode_packet，这次参数是CloudNative_ServiceMesh。
等等，响应解码那里MCP返回的是Decoded response，不是Decoded structure。虽然类似，但语义上要区分。然后Protocol给Packet，Packet同时update state和发response entry给UI。
已修正。最后是Analysis Features部分：用户click traffic entry，UI向Packet get packet details，返回JSON + Hex + Headers，显示在tabs里。
还有一步，用户可以request analysis，这时候UI调MCP的analyze_traffic，参数是CloudNative_DockerImage，返回patterns和statistics。
确认一下三个CloudNative环境的分配：请求拦截和状态提取用K8sCluster，UI和录制用HelmChart，DockerImage只出现在最后的analyze_traffic调用？
是的，这样体现不同负载跑在不同环境。DockerImage专门做分析计算，K8sCluster处理核心流量，HelmChart管前端和录制。整体加上Traffic Capture Flow、Response Capture Flow、Analysis Features三个Note标注。
完成。所有participant都用了emoji标识，autonumber开启，三个rect色块分别对应K8sCluster、K8sCluster、HelmChart，alt分支处理录制逻辑，MCP的两次decode和一次analyze都标注了对应的环境参数。
